title: Can the Income Tax Department issue a notice after a taxpayer's death? Allahabad HC answers
summary: The Allahabad High Court has ruled that an income tax notice issued after a taxpayer's death is legally invalid. Here's what the judgment means for legal heirs and when the Income Tax Department can still recover dues.

title: Government warns against job scams; NCS registration, applications and interviews remain free
summary: The Ministry of Labour has warned of rising online recruitment scams. It reminded job seekers that National Career Service (NCS) services are free. Fraud should be reported to helpline 1930 or the National Cyber Reporting Platform (NCRP).

title: Filed your ITR? Don't miss this final step or your income tax return may be treated as invalid
summary: Filing your Income Tax Return is only half the job. Taxpayers must e-verify their ITR within the prescribed deadline, or the return may be treated as invalid.

title: Switched jobs? Your EPF may not transfer automatically unless you meet these conditions
summary: EPFO now automatically transfers EPF balances for eligible members after a job switch, removing the need to file a transfer claim in many cases. But the facility works only if specific conditions are met and missing records can still hold up the transfer.

title: Gold, silver prices today, 24 July: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver in Delhi, Mumbai and Kolkata

title: Health insurance claim rejected over hospitalisation? Court rules in policyholder's favour
summary: A Delhi consumer commission has ruled that health insurers cannot reject claims merely by declaring hospitalisation medically unnecessary without evidence. The order reinforces that a treating doctor's clinical judgment cannot be replaced by an insurer's assessment.

title: ITR filing: Section 143(1) tax demand explained; steps to avoid penalties and disputes
summary: A Section 143(1) tax demand does not always mean your ITR is wrong. Here's why taxpayers receive this notice, how to verify mismatches, respond correctly through the Income Tax e-filing portal and avoid penalties.

title: ITR filing deadline 2026: 5 income tax penalties every taxpayer must know for AY 2026-27
summary: Five income tax penalties applicable for AY 2026-27 include late Income Tax Return filing fees, revised return charges and misreporting penalties. Here's why filing your ITR before 31 helps avoid fines, delays and tax notices.

title: 8th Pay Commission: Level 15-18 employees may get monthly HRA of up to ₹1.93 lakh if 2.57 fitment factor is approved
summary: The 8th Pay Commission could significantly raise HRA for Level 15-18 Central government employees if a higher fitment factor is approved. Illustrative estimates indicate monthly HRA may reach ₹1.93 lakh in X-category cities, though final revisions await the government's decision.

title: SIFs are designed to improve risk-adjusted returns: Edelweiss' Bhavesh Jain

title: SBI Funds Management shares fall below IPO price, but brokerages remain bullish. Time to buy?
summary: SBI Funds Management shares slipped below their IPO price after listing, but brokerages remain bullish on the stock, citing strong parentage, a vast distribution network, sticky SIP flows, robust profitability and long-term mutual fund growth opportunities.

title: US investors rethink bonds' role as inflation reshapes portfolios
summary: US investors are reducing bond allocations and increasing inflation-sensitive assets. This shift aims to diversify portfolios against market volatility and rising prices. title: Global Market: ECB signals future debate on raising bank reserve requirements to reduce central bank losses
summary: The European Central Bank may increase minimum reserve requirements for commercial banks. This move could reduce interest payments made to lenders by the Eurosystem.
